rulings.Case Title: RICHARD DI BERNARDO VS. AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED, INC. DBA AMERICAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 18, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED, INC. Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint. Motion to strike granted, no opposition filed. Court adopts defendant's proposed order as to the language to be stricken and the amendments to be made. Plaintiff allowed ten days leave to amend to comply with order. Plaintiff need not pay the $200.00 sanction before filing the amended complaint. Insufficient notice to grant request to reclassify case to limited jurisdiction. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ZAKARIAH LAFRENIERE VS. THE BOARD OF TRUSTEE OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 18, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEE OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained, no opposition filed. No leave to amend. The Court lacks jurisdiction because plaintiff is not the original source of the purported false claims [Government Code section 12652(d)(3)(A)]. Plaintiff fails to state a claim because there is no showing of a false claim by the Board, or one that the state was not aware; the Board is not a proper defendant; and plaintiff failed to comply with the procedural requirements of the False Claims Act. (Government Code sections 12650 - 12652.) No reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)
